chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Obligatory for One Who Breaks the Fast or Engages in Intercourse in the Month of Ramadan Intentionally or Forgetfully

parts.text: رَوَى مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ اَلنُّعْمَانِ عَنْهُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : أَنَّهُ سُئِلَ
رَجُلٍ أَفْطَرَ يَوْماً مِنْ شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ

text: «كَفَّارَتُهُ جَرِيبَانِ مِنْ طَعَامٍ وَ هُوَ عِشْرُونَ صَاعاً ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1888 - Muhammad ibn al-Nu'man narrated from Imam (as) that he was asked about a man who broke his fast for one day in the Month of Ramadan.
Imam (as) said: "His expiation is two jars (jariban) of food, which is equivalent to twenty sa'."
